title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Rustomjee Group Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Rustomjee Group Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
We at Rustomjee Group Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Rustomjee Group Holdings Services:
Rustomjee Group Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rustomjee Group Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
